word: G2691 - καταστρηνιάω - katastrēniáō - kat-as-tray-nee-ah'-o - Begin to wax wanton against

sections.paragraph:
- Original: καταστρηνιάω

- Transliteration: Katastreniao

- Phonetic: kat-as-tray-nee-ah'-o

- Definition:

1. to feel the impulses of sexual desire

- Origin: from G2596 and G4763

- TDNT entry: 13:31,4

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2596 and G4763; to become voluptuous against: - begin to wax wanton against.
